ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team's name (e.g., GSW for Golden State Warriors) */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists made in the season */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds collected in the season */,
  "fg_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made in the season */,
  "fg_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted in the season */,
  "three_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made in the season */,
  "three_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted in the season */,
  "ft_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made in the season */,
  "ft_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted in the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made in the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made in the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, coach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that played the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win/loss) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the game */,
  "points_conceded" INTEGER /* Points conceded by the team in the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home/away) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_team_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player joined the team */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player left the team */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
